docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHWEH, SEANI AS TO DEFENDANT INTERCONTINENTAL HOTELS OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC BROADSPIRE SERVICES INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-23-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-23-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH M. FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF SEANI CHWEH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT INTERCONTINENTAL HOTELS OF SAN FRANCISCO REPRESENTED BY MARIAM METIVISHVILI, DIRECTOR OF FRONT OFFICE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BROADSPIRE INSURANCE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SUE NIX, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. PROOF OF SERVICE ON INTERCONTINENTAL HOTELS IS ON FILE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BROADSPIRE INSURANCE. PLAINTIFF DISMISSES WITHOUT PREJUDICE THE CASE ON DEFENDANT BROADSPIRE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-03-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT INTERCONTINENTAL HOTELS OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHWEH, SEANI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INTERCONTINENTAL HOTELS OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $315.00, LIABILITY IS LIMITED TO $250 PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1859. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,995.45 FILED BY CHWEH, SEANI AS TO DEFENDANT INTERCONTINENTAL HOTELS OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC BROADSPIRE SERVICES INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT INTERCONTINENTAL HOTELS OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARIAM METIVISHVILI, DIRECTOR OF FRONT DESK FILED BY DEFENDANT INTERCONTINENTAL HOTELS OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC
